---
name: LHDN publication update
about: Flag that LHDN published a new Guideline / SDK / FAQ update
title: "[UPDATE] "
labels: lhdn-update, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What LHDN published
<!-- New Guideline version? SDK release? FAQ entry? Rule change? -->



## Source URL
<!-- Link to the official LHDN page / PDF -->



## Date of LHDN publication



## What changed vs. previous version
<!-- Summary of the change. "Added CF423 validation for postal codes",
     "Updated state code list", "New sub-section on foreign exchange". -->



## Which files in this repo need updating
<!-- Based on the content, which markdown files need to be revised?
     Helpful for whoever picks up the PR. -->

- [ ] `README.md` — update "last verified" badge
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` — add entry
- [ ] `11-irbm-specific-guideline/README.md` — if Specific Guideline
- [ ] `12-cookbook/irbm-general-guideline/README.md` — if General Guideline
- [ ] `12-cookbook/10-implementation-timeline.md` — if timeline changed
- [ ] `05-code-tables/` — if code tables changed
- [ ] `12-cookbook/06-field-validation-rules.md` — if validation rules changed
- [ ] Other:

## Can you do the PR yourself?
<!-- Totally fine to just flag it. But if you have time to do the work, say so. -->
